_comment: Which nodes in workflow.api.json gen-char.mjs should patch. After you re-export your workflow, update these ids to match. saveNodePrefix must equal the SaveImage node's filename_prefix.
styleSuffix: pixelsprite, solo, single character, one person, full-body, centered, pixel art, limited muted daylight palette, soft cool lighting, clean pixel grid, plain flat background
negativeExtra: sprite sheet, character sheet, multiple views, multiple characters, two characters, 2girls, 2boys, duplicate, cloned, side by side, turnaround, grid, cropped
_ipadapter: #A3b identity. Used only when gen-char gets --ref. gen-char injects the IPAdapter nodes (ip_model/ip_clipvision/ip_image/ip_apply) and rewires the KSampler (seedNodeId) model input through ip_apply. modelNodeId = checkpoint that feeds the base MODEL. refImageNodeId = the injected LoadImage node (matches gen-char). Files must exist on the ComfyUI host.
_scene: #A8 background gen (gen-char --scene). Swaps the character style/trigger for the scene one (16bitscene), renders landscape, skips bg-cutout, quantizes taller, writes public/bg/<id>.png. latentNodeId = the EmptyLatentImage node whose width/height get patched.
sceneStyleSuffix: 16bitscene, pixel art landscape, detailed scenery background, empty location, limited muted daylight palette, soft cool lighting, clean pixel grid
sceneNegativeExtra: people, person, characters, figure, sprite sheet, grid, duplicate, watermark, text
